lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and rust. The interior shows heavy wear and tear on the upholstery and dashboard. Mechanically, the car requires major repairs.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several visible scratches and minor dents. The interior shows moderate wear and some staining on the upholstery. All mechanical systems are currently functional, though the vehicle will require routine maintenance in the near future.

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, appearing and driving as if it just left the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless with no scratches or dents, and the interior is pristine, featuring premium materials that show zero signs of wear. Mechanically, the car is perfect; the engine is powerful and quiet, and the transmission shifts seamlessly. It has been meticulously maintained with a complete service history and has always been garaged. This is a rare find for a buyer seeking a vehicle in showroom quality without any compromises.

Looking for a dependable vehicle that’s ready for your daily commute? This car is a solid, honest choice that has been well-traveled and is ready for its next chapter! While it shows some visible wear and tear consistent with its age and mileage, it remains a functional and spirited performer. This is a fantastic opportunity to get behind the wheel of a reliable car at a very accessible price point!

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable option for a buyer looking for a dependable driver that requires some cosmetic and mechanical attention. The exterior shows its age with several noticeable scratches, a few small door dings, and the beginning of clear coat oxidation on the roof and trunk. Inside, the interior is functional but shows wear, particularly on the driver’s side seat bolster and some fading on the dashboard plastics. Mechanically, the car starts and runs consistently, though the service history suggests it is due for a comprehensive tune-up and the tires will likely need replacement within the next year. It is a solid, honest vehicle that would benefit greatly from a dedicated owner willing to invest a bit of time into its upkeep.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Combining robust mechanical integrity with a refined aesthetic, it offers exceptional performance and reliability. Having undergone a rigorous professional assessment, this motorcar stands as a testament to quality and enduring value. We invite you to secure this sophisticated driving experience at an exceptional price point.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my reliable ride, and it's honestly such a great find. It’s been well-taken care of and is in solid shape, perfect for zipping around town or hitting the highway for a weekend getaway. It drives like a dream and still has that sparkle! I'm looking for a quick, friendly sale, so come take a look and see for yourself why I've loved owning it!

Available is an exceptionally sorted E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six power plant, equipped with individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline. This driver-focused example utilizes a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission and a factory variable M differential lock for superior lateral dynamics. Critical preventative maintenance has been addressed, including a comprehensive subframe reinforcement and a full double-VANOS overhaul to ensure optimal cam timing and torque delivery. The chassis remains taut with upgraded polyurethane bushings and a refreshed cooling system featuring an aluminum radiator. Riding on staggered Style 67 forged alloys with a well-maintained interior, this M3 delivers a visceral, analog driving experience that remains a benchmark for balanced weight distribution and steering feedback.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Ready for immediate sale.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in excellent mechanical health. The exterior features its original factory paint, which still holds a deep shine, though there are minor, barely-noticeable surface blemishes consistent with careful daily use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean;

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a superior balance of performance and value. Characterized by its mechanical integrity and well-preserved interior, the automobile offers a refined driving experience synonymous with its lineage. Having undergone a comprehensive inspection to ensure its continued reliability, this specimen stands as a testament to diligent ownership. We invite the discerning buyer to experience a vehicle that delivers consistent excellence on every journey.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the sophisticated buyer. Exhibiting consistent mechanical stewardship and a well-preserved aesthetic, this unit delivers a refined and reliable driving experience. Its structural integrity and interior presentation reflect a high standard of care that ensures both immediate satisfaction and enduring value. A distinguished choice for those prioritizing quality and performance.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty ride and it's looking for a new home! It’s been super well-loved and is in really solid shape—perfect for your daily commute or a fun weekend road trip. It runs like a dream and is ready to hit the road today. I'm sad to see it go, but I know you're going to love it just as much as I have! Come take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six engine, characterized by its individual throttle bodies and a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. Power is delivered through a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to a factory-spec variable M differential lock, ensuring optimal traction and linear power delivery. The chassis remains taut with documented subframe reinforcement and refreshed bushings, while the MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear suspension geometry provide exceptional lateral grip. The VANOS system has been comprehensively serviced to maintain precise variable valve timing. Finished in Carbon Black, this is a mechanically sound example of BMW’s peak 'Ultimate Driving Machine' era, offering a visceral, naturally aspirated driving experience.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Runs smooth.

This vehicle is a prime example of a well-maintained daily driver that balances performance with comfort. The exterior finish retains its deep luster, with only minor, age-appropriate imperfections that do not detract from its overall curb appeal. Inside, the cabin remains a sanctuary; the upholstery is clean and free of tears, the dashboard is crack-free, and every button and switch functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car has been treated with care, benefiting from a documented service history that ensures its reliability for the next owner. The engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts are crisp, and the suspension provides a composed ride. It sits on a set of premium tires with substantial tread remaining. This is a turn-key vehicle perfect for someone who values a car that has been respected and kept in solid, reliable condition.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, which strikes an ideal balance between performance and long-term value. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection, it exhibits robust mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic. This offering represents a sophisticated choice for the discerning driver seeking a high-caliber driving experience and proven reliability.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Characterized by consistent mechanical integrity and a sophisticated presentation, the automobile offers a superior balance of performance and long-term reliability. Each system has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our established standards for excellence and roadworthiness. We invite you to acquire a vehicle that exemplifies professional care and enduring value.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty car and it’s been such a joy to drive! It's in really solid shape and has been super well-maintained, so it’s totally ready for its next adventure with you. It runs smooth, looks great, and I’ve honestly loved every mile in it. If you’re looking for a reliable ride that still feels fresh and fun, this is definitely the one! Feel free to reach out with any questions—I’d love to see it go to a good home!
Used car. Condition: good.
Vehicle in good condition. Regularly serviced. Clean interior. Mechanically sound.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and daily reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish, showing only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful use. Inside, you’ll find a pristine, smoke-free cabin featuring supple leather upholstery, a fully functional infotainment system, and dual-zone climate control that remains crisp and responsive. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly, benefiting from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule; recent service includes a fresh oil change, fluid top-offs, and a comprehensive multi-point inspection. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the brake pads were replaced within the last year to ensure peak stopping power. This car drives straight, shifts effortlessly, and offers a quiet, composed ride. Ideal for a buyer seeking a high-quality, dependable vehicle that has been treated with genuine care. Complete service records are available for your review.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and consistent care. Meticulously maintained and thoroughly inspected, this model offers a refined driving experience and an aesthetic presence that reflects a history of diligent ownership. It represents an outstanding opportunity for the discerning professional seeking a reliable, high-performance asset that balances sophisticated engineering with long-term value.

Presenting a vehicle that exemplifies both mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. This meticulously maintained example offers dependable performance and a sophisticated driving experience, representing an exceptional value proposition for the discerning buyer. Its consistent service history ensures continued reliability and peak operational standards for its next owner.

Hey there! I’m selling my reliable car, and it’s honestly been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-maintained over the years. Perfect for daily commutes or weekend road trips! It runs smoothly and looks great—definitely a catch for anyone looking for a dependable ride that’s ready to go. Come take it for a spin, you'll love how it handles!

Offered is a mechanically sound E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54B32 power plant equipped with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. This example utilizes the Getrag Type D 6-speed manual transmission delivering power through a variable M differential lock. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive valve adjustment and subframe reinforcement to ensure structural rigidity. The suspension geometry remains true, benefiting from refreshed bushings and dampers. While displaying minor cosmetic patina consistent with spirited use, the drivetrain remains robust with linear power delivery and precise shift gate engagement.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Well-maintained engine. Clean interior. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle is a standout choice for those seeking a balance of luxury and dependability. The exterior showcases a vibrant finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections typical of a well-loved car. Inside, you'll find a clean, smoke-free cabin where the upholstery remains supple and all electronic components—from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system—operate flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in solid health, having undergone regular fluid changes and inspections; it shifts smoothly and handles the road with confidence. With a complete service history and tires in great shape, this vehicle is ready for its next chapter and offers incredible value for its next owner.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle reflects a commitment to consistent maintenance and mechanical integrity. It offers a sophisticated driving experience characterized by reliable performance and a well-preserved aesthetic. This represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning professional seeking a vehicle that balances premium features with substantial value.
